description: Show your workout statistics from Lyfta

apiKey.description: API Key from Lyfta (generate at https://my.lyfta.app/community/api)
apiKey.label: Lyfta API Key

exercises_compact.description: Hide avg/1RM, show only sessions count
exercises_compact.label: Compact mode

exercises_hide_images.description: Hide exercise images in the exercises list
exercises_hide_images.label: Hide exercise images

exercises_max.label: Maximum exercises
exercises_max.tooltip: Maximum number of exercises to display. Exercises are ordered by total volume (highest volume first).

exercises_show_1rm.description: Display estimated one-rep max for each exercise
exercises_show_1rm.label: Show estimated 1RM

last_workout_compact.description: Hide set details, show only volume
last_workout_compact.label: Compact mode

last_workout.description: Detailed view of the most recent workout
last_workout.name: Last Workout

overview_period_days.description: Number of days to include in overview
overview_period_days.label: Period (days)

overview.description: General workout summary for a period
overview.name: Overview

workouts_max.label: Maximum workouts
workouts_max.tooltip: Maximum number of recent workouts to display. Workouts are ordered by most recent.

statistics_period_days.description: Number of days for period stats
statistics_period_days.label: Period (days)
